items.title: A 'fun' superstar stuns rivals and reshapes politics in an Indian state
items.dek: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.
items.body: Film star Vijay has defied naysayers to almost sweep Tamil Nadu polls, marking a break in the political order.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Do viruses spread more easily on cruise ships?
items.dek: The BBC explains what experts have to say about the infection risks associated with cruise ships.
items.body: The BBC explains what experts have to say about the infection risks associated with cruise ships.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Explosion at China fireworks factory kills 26 people
items.dek: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.
items.body: A blast at a fireworks factory in Hunan province has killed 26 people and injured 61, state media report.
items.author: IriLine Desk
